heading: Exclusion of Great Onyx and Crystal Caves
label: 404b–1 Exclusion of Great Onyx and Crystal Caves
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized, in his discretion, to exclude the Great Onyx Cave and the Crystal Cave, or either of them, from the maximum boundaries of the said park, and the area required for general development of the said park by , is modified accordingly.section 404b of this title
notes: Eventual Acquisition of Great Onyx and Crystal CavesEventual acquisition of Great Onyx and Crystal Caves, see .section 404b–2 of this title
